subcodes.first_line: O thou who art blessed with turning toward the Most Glorious Horizon! By God, the True One, the realm of contingent being hath adorned itself with garments of glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توفق بالتوجه الی الافق الابهی تالله الحق ان الامکان یرقل فی حلل الفخار
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
